zh.Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Mortimer於1280年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫時，他的父親Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer28歲，母親Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes31歲。他與Joan de Joinville結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United: 英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Mortimer于1280年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫时，他的父亲Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer28岁，母亲Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes31岁。他与Joan de Joinville结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Mortimer was born in 1280, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, was 31. He married Joan de Joinville. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Mortimer est né en 1280, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Joinville. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Mortimer 1280 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes 31. Er hat Joan de Joinville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Mortimer è nato il nel 1280 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Joinville. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Wigmore, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモー
ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Mortimerが1280年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimerは28歳，母Margaret Eleanor de Fiennesは31歳であった。Joan de Joinvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Mortimer(이)가 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Joan de Joinville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United: Wigmore, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Mortimer nasceu em 1280, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Joinville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Mortimer родился в 1280 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Joinville. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Mortimer nació en 1280, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan de Joinville. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
